upgrades.name: Kitten
upgrades.description: A curious kitten paws the yarn and adds a bright melody note.

upgrades.name: House Cat
upgrades.description: A full-grown cat keeps the yarn moving with reliable rhythm.

upgrades.name: Scratching Post
upgrades.description: Adds a percussive groove and helps every cat hit harder.

upgrades.name: Yarn Basket
upgrades.description: Bundles loose yarn into cleaner production and soft texture.

upgrades.name: Cat Tower
upgrades.description: High ground for the cats, plus a deeper bass pulse.

upgrades.name: Cat Choir
upgrades.description: A chorus of meows turns the mill into a fuller arrangement.

upgrades.name: Grand Meowstro
upgrades.description: The late-run conductor cat that makes the whole song bloom.
